mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, cover_image, author_id, author_name, author_avatar, category_id, category_name, tags, view_count, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, status, is_top, is_recommend, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, publish_time
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.avatar as author_avatar FROM psi_blog_article a LEFT JOIN sys_blog_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT a.*, u.avatar as author_avatar FROM psi_blog_article a LEFT JOIN sys_blog_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.del_flag = '0'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) FROM psi_blog_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '1'
